welcomeMessageBottom: We play in the Derby Junior League and train in Spondon!

about.description: We are a passionate grassroots football team for under 7s, playing in the Derby Junior League and training in Spondon.

sponsors.name: Impact Academy Derby
sponsors.description: Impact pride themselves on providing a exciting and unique experience where fun and learning go hand in hand – children explore technology, create their own projects, and keep discovering new things. You can join us at our location or we can bring the fun to you – wherever is most convenient!

sponsors.name: Lonsdale Swimming Pool
sponsors.description:
Gayton/lonsdale Swimming Pool is used for a wide variety of lessons, courses and leisure sessions by local clubs, schools, private hirers and the public – it is open every day.  There are children’s lessons held every day of the week and adult lessons are also available. Learning to swim is an invaluable life skill for everyone – regardless of age, physical ability, culture or family circumstances. 
Both community swimming pools offer a wide range of value for money sessions for hundreds of children, adults and families a week. 
Staffed by qualified and highly experienced teachers and lifeguards, Gayton offers value for money swimming activities including children’s and adult swimming lessons, fun family sessions, adult only swimming sessions on a ‘pay as you go’ basis and facilities for local clubs and schools.
